name: lab
description: /lab вҖ” research-lab control-tower (domain-agnostic) with a code-level decision harness (0.7.0) + all-paths autonomy (0.8.0). One persistent mission-control over EVERY in-flight job of a long-running campaign across ANY execution surface (rented pods via cloud В· pool hosts В· local procs). Ties the manifest (cwd ./pods.json) + event-driven watchers + harvest+verdict + the autonomous harvestвҶ’re-dispatch loop into one command. NOT domain-locked вҖ” DFT sweeps В· ML training fleets В· build matrices В· render farms В· any N-parallel-job campaign with a queued backlog. 1.5.0 STRENGTHENS the g59 upstream-reflex to AUTO-DISPATCH the fix UNCONDITIONALLY: when a campaign run detects an upstream-fixable gap (a hexa cloud/deck/CLI limitation В· a false-terminal the CLI should have classified В· a transport ambiguity В· a missing preflight/OOM axis В· a cost-leak the rent-guard should prevent В· any hand-workaround of the tooling) in watch/harvest/next/auto/drive/pursue or the upstream verb, /lab now (a) files the `sidecar handoff add <repo> <gap>` record as before AND (b) IMMEDIATELY spawns ONE background fix agent (general-purpose В· run_in_background В· isolation:worktree) that fixes-at-source + ships a PR (branch off main В· <200 lines В· Co-Authored-By trailer В· gh pr create В· pr-cycle auto-merge В· sidecar sync after) вҖ” same-turn, no user confirmation (л¬ҙмЎ°кұҙ). This is NOT the 4м¶• auto-decide fork logic вҖ” it is an ALWAYS-ON reflex; an upstream code-fix PR is reversible + low-blast-radius so it never falls under the @L3 human-only gates. The only brakes are idempotency (no re-dispatch of a gap already in the handoff trail or already carrying an open PR вҖ” dedup via the upstream verb trail + gh pr list) and a вүӨ3 in-flight concurrency cap (queue the rest). Logs one line per dispatch вҖ” `рҹ”§ upstream auto-dispatch: <gap one-liner> вҶ’ agent <id> вҶ’ PR pending (g59 В· л¬ҙмЎ°кұҙ)`; the upstream verb trail additionally shows auto-dispatched fixes (agent id + PR state). 1.4.0 ADDS 4м¶• auto-decide: at any mid-run LLM decision gate in next/auto/drive/pursue where >1 technically-viable option exists, /lab AUTO-PICKS on the canonical 4 axes (мҷ„м„ұлҸ„ complete В· лӢЁмҲң simple В· м•Ҳм „ safe В· н‘ңмӨҖ std вҖ” recommend.tape r1, scored 1вҖ“5, weighted average default 1:1:1:1, tieвҶ’safe wins) and renders one collapsed line `рҹӨ– 4м¶• auto-pick: <option> (мҷ„м„ұлҸ„=X лӢЁмҲң=Y м•Ҳм „=Z н‘ңмӨҖ=W В· weighted=<sum>)`, instead of stalling the campaign for the user; the autonomy invariant is preserved вҖ” only a human-only gate (credential В· irreversible/destructive В· genuine open-ended design) and the budget cap (g64) still halt. bin/system_harness.hexa (the deterministic decide() binary) unchanged. Verbs: bare/status В· progress (1.1.0 read-only research-ARC bar) В· tick [--apply] (0.7.0 deterministic probeвҶ’classifyвҶ’decide harness via bin/system_harness.hexa) В· watch В· harvest [<id>] В· next/redispatch В· auto В· drive В· pursue (0.8.0 вҖ” ALL-PATHS autonomy: enumerate EVERY open campaign thread (stalled-resumable jobs В· tooling gaps В· queued waves В· cost-leaks В· un-harvested terminals) + fan ALL out in parallel вүӨ2-3 agents, NO human 'which next?' menu; only genuine human-input gates wait) В· mirror [<seed>] (1.2.0 кұ°мҡёл°© вҖ” DELEGATE to the hexa-loop skill --adapter=atlas, d4 reuse) В· stop В· cost В· queue [add|rm|ls] В· upstream [<repo>]. 1.3.0 ADDS an explicit ALL-PARALLEL dispatch principle (вҶ” project.tape d_parallel_fire): campaign dispatch fires N candidates across DEDICATED PARALLEL pods (one jobвҶ’one slot В· ranksвүӨphyscores/pod В· OMP/MKL/OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=1), NEVER bin-packed into a single-pod sequential onstart.sh chain; a stuck single-pod sequential chain (a flagship blocking the rest) is SPLIT onto parallel pods on sight. Threaded into next/auto/pursue/drive + the queue taxonomy (queued candidates fire in parallel; a single-pod sequential chain is the anti-pattern to split). Live lesson: a 6-perovskite batch chained on one vast pod вҶ’ 270-thread/load-119 thrash + CaAuH3 blocked 6 others for days. 1.2.0 ADDS `lab mirror` (the mirror room вҖ” pure delegation to the hexa-loop skill's --adapter=atlas preset, the old mirror-loop miningвҶ’kickвҶ’atlas self-evolution ouroboros, NO reimplementation) + documents a planned lab-lifecycle subcommand set (notebook = append-only journal/decision log В· bench = micro-experiment sweep wrapping /micro-exp В· review = verdict-matrix audit) as stubs. 1.1.0 ADDED `lab progress` вҖ” a read-only campaign-ARC 10-cell bar aggregating verdicts-closed (exports/*/ledger.json + .verdicts/), papers-shipped (PAPER.tape), atlas atom-growth (hexa atlas stats), domain milestones (DOMAINS.tape); each source degrades gracefully (absent вҶ’ dropped from the mean, not 0%). DISTINCT from `status` (per-job operational live dashboard) вҖ” `progress` is the epistemic research-program arc. 1.0.0 RENAMED the skill `system вҶ’ lab` (research-lab metaphor); the `/system` invocation + every prior trigger (кҙҖм ңнғ‘ В· mission control В· control tower В· campaign status) stay live as DEPRECATED aliases вҖ” lossless, so existing muscle memory never breaks. All prior verbs preserved verbatim; bin/system_harness.hexa unchanged. Abstract job model. Reuses ./pods.json (cloud dispatch SSOT). Triggers: /lab В· лһ© В· м—°кө¬мӢӨ В· research lab В· lab progress В· м—°кө¬ м§„мІҷлҸ„ В· lab mirror В· кұ°мҡёл°© В· /system (deprecated) В· кҙҖм ңнғ‘ (deprecated) В· мә нҺҳмқё нҳ„нҷ© В· mission control (deprecated) В· campaign status (deprecated) В· нӣ„ліҙ мһҗмңЁ В· лӘЁл“  кІҪлЎң м§„н–ү В· pursue В· tick В· кІ°кіјліҙкі  м¶”к°Җл°ңмӮ¬ В· мһҗмңЁ мһ¬л°ңмӮ¬ лЈЁн”„ В· control tower (deprecated).
